roi_reason: Census is RED solely on rule-1 flags: 8 of 38 loops never produced a receipt. Until each is classified from evidence, the registry cannot be trusted and every downstream dispatch inherits doubt. Mechanical triage, cheap tier, removes recurring founder investigation workload.
context_summary: workflow-census-20260706T093358Z is RED: 8 loops flagged rule-1 'never produced receipt — NONE': mac_launchd_brain_loop_autorun_v1, cf_brain_chat_v1, gh_actions_noos_release_gate_v1, gh_actions_noos_publish_pypi_v1, gh_gateway_railway_deadman_v1, cf_gateway_ops_v1, cf_gateway_heartbeat_v1, trustfield_loops_preview. NONE-class loops also carry ~$20/mo of the census cost table. Task is triage classification only — census RED is NOT claimed fixed by this packet.
task: Triage the 8 receipt-less loops from evidence only. For each loop_id: 1) locate its registry/census entry and expected receipt_path glob; 2) search receipts/ and any declared receipt sinks for ANY matching artifact; 3) where the loop is a GitHub Actions workflow, read its workflow file and run-history evidence available in the repo (badges, prior receipts, census extensions data) — do not trigger runs; 4) classify each loop as exactly one of: RECEIPT_EXISTS_WRONG_GLOB | REGISTERED_NEVER_FIRED | LOOP_DEAD_OR_REMOVED | NEVER_DEPLOYED | UNKNOWN_REQUIRES_MAC (for mac_launchd/local loops whose truth is not in repo or cloud evidence — mark, never guess); 5) for each, record the exact evidence (file path, glob tried, output); 6) emit one receipt to receipts/p0pgr/ with the 8-row verdict table and a per-loop next_pointer (candidate repair packet or decommission candidate). No healing, no edits outside receipts/p0pgr/, no run triggering.
constraints: UNKNOWN_REQUIRES_MAC is a valid verdict — never interpolate local state (L10)
do not claim census RED is fixed
allowed_actions: run grep/glob over the repo checkout
write exactly one triage receipt to receipts/p0pgr/
forbidden_actions: no triggering of any loop or workflow
no edits to registries, verifiers, gates, or census scripts
no PASS based on self-report or prose-as-proof
stop_rule: Stop after writing the single 8-row triage receipt. Repair or decommission actions are separate future packets.
